query: SELECT id, awayTeamAbbrev AS away, homeTeamAbbrev AS home, awayBookSpread AS bookAwayRL, homeBookSpread AS bookHomeRL, awayModelSpread AS mdlAwayRL, homeModelSpread AS mdlHomeRL, awayRunLine, homeRunLine, awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLineOdds, modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, modelTotal, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, publishedModel FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-26' AND sport = 'MLB' ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC
